items.title: Pakistan strikes Afghanistan and declares 'open war' on Taliban - what we know so far
items.description: Bombings by Pakistan are the most significant development in tensions between the two neighbours - though the physical impact remains unclear.

items.title: Why Trump means the Cuban Revolution faces its biggest threat yet
items.description: Will a worsening internal crisis create the conditions for the Cuban Revolution to unravel from within?

items.title: Man arrested after Winston Churchill statue defaced with graffiti
items.description: The statue of the former prime minster at Westminster was vandalised with slogans daubed in red paint.

items.title: From plumber to Parliament, who is the Green Party's new MP?
items.description: Spencer marked her victory by apologising to customers for potentially having to cancel work due to her Westminster move.

items.title: Soham murderer Ian Huntley in serious condition after makeshift weapon attack
items.description: Huntley, who is serving a life sentence for murdering two schoolgirls, has significant head trauma, the BBC understands.
